    Ensures that solve returns a fresh name, even in case of conflict.
    void

    Ensures that the computed fresh name is not returned twice when added.
    void

    Ensures that solve returns a fresh name, even in case of conflict with other names or reserved names contributed by a datatype.
    void

    Ensures that solve returns a fresh name, even in case of conflict with other names or reserved names (prj1 and prj2)
